programme.desc: Forbidden Science is a unique blend of noir science fiction and erotic programming. Set in the near future, the stories revolve around the evil corporation, 4Ever Innovations, whose young and brilliant scientists download and sell memories. They replace those we've lost with clones and devise technology that helps us live out our greatest fantasies; from saving a failed relationship, to creating the perfect lover, to being irresistible to the opposite sex - but sometimes our deepest desires come at a terrible price. 4Ever offers customers the opportunity to live out their fantasies in a virtual world but there are secrets within 4Ever Innovations that may cost you your life.

Paul Carcaterra also visits South Bend, Indiana to learn from one of the best brother-duos in the history of lacrosse.

programme.title: Losing Is Worse Than Death | The Bill Tierney Documentary
programme.desc: Coach Bill Tierney is a legend. Over his five decade coaching career, he's accomplished almost everything: NCAA Championships, Coach of the Year honors, induction into the Hall of Fame. The last accomplishment left for his resume? A PLL Championship. Philadelphia finished 2-8 in Coach Tierney's inaugural year at the helm. Now in his second season, Tierney is aiming to right the ship and has his sights on one more ring.

programme.title: Mitchell Pehlke Lacrosse Show
programme.desc: Welcome to Episode 21 (Season 3) of the Mitchell Pehlke Lacrosse Show presented by Duke Cannon. It's a double interview episode, as the crew welcomes both Maryland Whipsnakes attackman Rob Pannell to talk about breaking the career points record and new Fairfield Stags head coach John Odierna following the PLL weekend in Connecticut. Kev ranks his top five PLL cover defenders, and Hoagie sets expectations for lacrosse legend Casey Powell as a new D1 head coach at Le Moyne. Editor

programme.desc: Jamie returns to cooking the food he loves the most, getting right to heart of the Italian kitchen.

programme.title: Crossing South
programme.desc: Fine dining while watching a polo game, & Wildlife rescuing in Ensenada.

programme.title: The Neighborhood with Nicole
programme.desc: We live like a local in The Hamptons. From paddle boarding the morning away to learning about art and history from the local experts we see everything the Hamptons has to offer. We top off the day with a classic float from the locals favorite spot.

programme.title: Toque 12
programme.desc: Phillip takes us to Spanish restaurant Catalunya, one of Wine & Dine Singapore’s top restaurants in 2013, helmed by Executive Chef Alain Devahive Toloso, previously of Michelin starred elBulli, to see just what makes this restaurant so special.

programme.title: A Taste of Italy with Nisha Katona
programme.desc: Chef and restaurateur Nisha Katona goes on a culinary journey to discover Italy's hidden foodie gems, learning the regional secrets that influence their dishes

programme.title: It's a Beautiful World
programme.desc: On the shores of Lake Atitlán, fisherman Juan Baldomero shares his mission of preserving the lake through sustainable practices, with a hands-on fishing trip and a traditional tamale-making session.

programme.title: Robin Hood of the Pecos
programme.desc: Roy Rogers finds himself elected sheriff in a wild Texas town after the Civil War. But can Roy handle a place under martial law? And can he save Gabby Hayes from being executed? And how many songs will he get to sing? Clear the burrs from your saddle a...

programme.title: The Hanged Man
programme.desc: After a condemned gunfighter (Steve Forrest) survives his own hanging, he helps a young widow stop a pitiless land baron from taking her ranch. This television feature boasts a strong cast of recognizable characters, including Will Geer, Sharon Acker, ...

programme.title: Tulsa
programme.desc: Susan Hayward stars in this dramatic tale of the Oklahoma oil boom. She plays Cherokee Lansing, a determined young woman out to protect her father's honor after he's killed by men from a competing oil company. With a cast that includes Robert Preston, ...

programme.title: Under California Stars
programme.desc: Disaster strikes when Roy Rogers's beloved horse Trigger is stolen and held for ransom money. Will Roy find $100,000 to get his faithful companion back, or will he find a way to trap the gang holding the horse hostage? Along with Roy and Trigger, you'l...

programme.title: Cowboy And The Prizefighter
programme.desc: Red Ryder takes Steve Stevenson, who has saved his life, to his ranch and gives him a job. Red's aunt, the Duchess, knew Steve's father, who supposedly committed suicide after losing his ranch betting on a prizefight. Steve refuses to believe that his ...

programme.title: Cockeyed Charlie Parkhurst
programme.desc: Wells Fargo stage driver Charlie Parkhurst wins fame for his daring endeavors.

programme.title: Head of the House
programme.desc: After their parents die, the Segar children leave their wagon train and head for Washington.

programme.title: Swamper Ike
programme.desc: A young man and the woman he loves want to marry, but their different backgrounds make their union difficult.

programme.title: The Greatest Scout of All
programme.desc: Sitting Bull's war plans come between scout Frank Grouard and his Sioux bride.

programme.title: The Devil's Due
programme.desc: A reformed criminal's former partners in crime come calling after robbing a bank.

programme.title: Hopalong Cassidy
programme.desc: Grit Xtra invites you to saddle up and ride alongside the larger-than-life stars of TV and cinema’s most iconic Westerns.

programme.title: Hopalong Cassidy
programme.desc: Grit Xtra invites you to saddle up and ride alongside the larger-than-life stars of TV and cinema’s most iconic Westerns.

programme.title: The Tall Texan
programme.desc: An escaped killer (Lloyd Bridges) leads a group of people in mining gold on Indian land.

programme.title: Gunfight at Comanche Creek
programme.desc: A detective (Audie Murphy) from a national agency baits a jailbreak/reward gang circa 1875.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Disreputable shepherd moves herd across Ponderosa, destroying rich pasture land.

programme.title: The Deadly Companions (1961)
programme.desc: A gunslinger accidentally kills a dance hall girl's son and, consumed by guilt, vows to escort her across dangerous Apache territory to bury the boy in his father’s grave

programme.title: The Big Cat (1949)
programme.desc: An escaped convict hiding out in the mountains finds redemption when he helps a local family protect their home and their livestock from a predatory cougar that is terrorizing the rural community.

programme.title: The Crooked Trail (1936)
programme.desc: A rancher uncovers a scheme by a corrupt rival to steal land and cattle, forcing him to take justice into his own hands to clear his name and save the valley.

programme.title: The Lone Ranger S1E8 -The Renegades,
programme.desc: When a crooked Indian agent and a gang of army deserters frame local tribesmen for supply train raids to provoke an unjust war, the Lone Ranger and Tonto work to expose the conspiracy and save Chief Swift Eagle from execution

programme.title: The Belle Starr Story (1968)
programme.desc: A fictionalized account of the legendary outlaw, depicting her transformation from a defiant woman into a notorious gunslinger who leads a gang of bandits in the post-Civil War West

programme.title: Dead for a Dollar
programme.desc: "Cowboy" has killed the son of a rancher who is now on his heels. He meets a Confederate soldier searching for a treasure. But others have picked up the scent of the gold as well, and soon the duo is pursued by Union and Mexican soldiers.

programme.title: Terror at Black Falls
programme.desc: In this western, a Mexican gunslinger is injured trying to save his son and put into prison. When he's released, he's got revenge on his mind.

programme.title: Tombstone Canyon
programme.desc: Maynard hears the cry of the weird masked "phantom" of Tombstone Canyon. The plot thickens when Maynard discovers a man with a key to his past has been murdered by the phantom

programme.title: Wolves of the Range
programme.desc: Dorn is after the rancher's land and is trying to stop Banker Brady from helping them. When his man Hammond kills Brady, there is a run on the bank and Rocky volunteers to ride to the next town for money.

programme.title: Stormy Trails
programme.desc: A rancher caught in the middle of a bank robbery shoots one of the robbers. However, the dead bandit turns out to be a former ranch hand who was suing him. The rancher is arrested for murder.

programme.title: FIXT: Truck Driver Aims To Live Longer With New Lease On Bite

programme.title: On The Job: Brendan Gets Down with Wildlife

programme.title: The Lost Children of Carlisle
programme.desc: A powerful look at the history of Native American boarding schools as told through the stories of tribal members and their surviving family members, who endured an educational system founded on the concept “Kill the Indian in him, and save the man.”
